hero.art_prompt: Meera, a 24 year old Indian graduate woman in a modest kurti, warm and hopeful, studying on a laptop at home with a few books, thoughtful aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Meera wanted a master's to teach and grow.
panels.img_prompt: Meera, 24, happily reading and taking notes with a laptop and books at home, thoughtful and warm, tidy room.

panels.narration: But a campus MA meant travel she could not manage.
panels.dialogue: How do I study from here?
panels.img_prompt: Meera looking thoughtful at her window, a book in hand, modest home, hopeful but unsure.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised MA she could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Meera's face lighting up with relief at a laptop showing a 100% online MA, warm glow, cosy study corner with books.

panels.narration: She enrolled and dived into her subject.
panels.img_prompt: Meera happily attending an online MA class on her laptop at home, notebook and books beside her, calm and content, warm light.

turn.title: Why An Online MA Just Works
points: Choose your subject: English, Economics, Public Policy and more, fully online.
Ideal for teaching, civil services prep, further study or a research path.
Wonderfully affordable: ₹45,000 for the full 2-year MA (₹22,500/year), with 0% interest EMI available.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MA, recognised for jobs and higher study.

testimonials.name: Meera Nair
testimonials.quote: I could finally do a master's in my subject without leaving home. It changed my plans.

testimonials.name: Sana Iqbal
testimonials.quote: So affordable. The small monthly EMI made a master's genuinely within reach.

testimonials.name: Divya Rao
testimonials.quote: The MA moved me toward teaching, exactly the career I wanted.

testimonials.name: Latha S
testimonials.quote: A recognised MA opened the door to further study and better roles.

facts.v: English, Economics, Public Policy and more
